# Percolate

> Percolate is an iOS app for specialty coffee drinkers. It builds your coffee
> shelf (owned / wishlist / finished), logs structured cupping notes on every
> bag, scans a label to identify any coffee, gives a flavor quiz for roast and
> origin matches from beans you'd actually like, and builds a personal taste
> profile from what you brew. The app does not sell coffee. It links out to
> roaster and retailer pages when users want to buy. Affiliate links are disclosed.

## Site
- [Home](https://percolateapp.com/): app overview, features, FAQ
- [About](https://percolateapp.com/about): who runs Percolate, editorial standards, what the app is and is not
- [Articles](https://percolateapp.com/articles): guides for coffee drinkers (cupping, roast levels, processing methods, brew dialing, origin)
- [Support](https://percolateapp.com/support): adding coffees, the free model, data export, account deletion, troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://percolateapp.com/privacy): data collection and handling
- [Terms of Service](https://percolateapp.com/terms): account, the free model, affiliate disclosure
- [Delete Account](https://percolateapp.com/delete-account): how to permanently delete your account and data

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://percolateapp.com/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index updated on every build
